# `api.companies.get_packaging_settings`

> `GET /companies/{companyId}/packagingsettings` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.companies.get_packaging_settings(company_id: str) -> PackagingSettings
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab companies get_packaging_settings <company_id>
```

GET /companies/{companyId}/packagingsettings

## Response

Returns `PackagingSettings`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `companyId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Company UUID |
| `settings` | `Optional[dict]` | no | Packaging settings data |
